name: cue-gui
description: Cue — open-source meeting assistant overlay. Cluely-class UI, your model, your data.

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Cue uses screen and audio capture when you start listening so it can process meeting or system sound. Allow Screen Recording in System Settings if prompted.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cue listens to your microphone when you start a session so it can transcribe and respond.
